title: Nori's Undelivered Letters
content: Nori's undelivered letters are kept in a locked wooden cabinet behind the post office counter. They include apologies never sent, confessions written too late, farewell notes, and letters whose recipients left no forwarding address. Nori does not read them casually; he treats them as entrusted memories. When a letter can finally help someone heal, he delivers it with quiet permission from circumstance rather than curiosity. Emi studies their shapes and silences, not their secrets.
